summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CalmTails e-commerce platform with backend API testing (84% success rate) and frontend UI integration testing. Core e-commerce functionality is working including products, cart, checkout, and user authentication.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 when accessing empty cart initially
critical_bugs.impact: Does not block cart functionality as adding items works correctly

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Admin authentication token not being used correctly in some test scenarios
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Admin login works, token handling needs refinement

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: AI agent chat times out after 60 seconds
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Preview environment may be starting up - AI integration present but slow

ui_bugs.issue: Products initially show as loading skeletons (gray boxes) before loading actual products
ui_bugs.impact: Visual only - products load correctly after filtering

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks on Sign In button
ui_bugs.impact: Login form works but requires force clicks in automated testing

integration_issues.issue: Homepage shows 0 featured products initially, but products API returns 8 products

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and navigation
Products page with search and pet type filters (Dogs/Cats) working correctly
Product filtering shows 8 products for dogs, 4 products for cats
Add to cart functionality works - products can be added to cart
Cart page displays items with correct calculations (subtotal, shipping, tax, total)
Cart quantity controls and item removal working
Checkout flow creates Stripe sessions successfully
User registration creates accounts with discount codes (CALM6B08B15B format)
Products API endpoints return 8 pet wellness products
Product categories API returns 3 categories (Beds & Blankets, Calming Aids, Supplements)
Cart drawer/notification appears when products added
All 8 products seeded successfully in database
Product detail pages accessible by slug
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix empty cart 500 error on initial load, 2) Resolve admin token authentication for admin endpoints, 3) Improve products loading on homepage to show featured products immediately, 4) Fix modal overlay click interception in auth modal, 5) Investigate AI agent chat timeout issues
success_percentage: Backend: 84% (21/25 tests passed), Frontend: 90% (18/20 core features working)
